sentence: Due to the sudden material shortage, we have to {blank} the project deadline to next month.
explanation: Postpone 係 B2 級別極常用嘅商業字眼，代替 delay。

sentence: The team must {blank} a new strategy to handle the increasing number of defective items.
explanation: Formulate a plan/strategy 指有系統地構思並制定計劃。

sentence: It is highly recommended to {blank} all important data before updating the factory system.
explanation: Backup data 喺 IT 同工程管理係必備動作。

sentence: Her presentation was very {blank}, covering all the necessary details without wasting any time.
explanation: Concise 讚美人講嘢精準、簡明扼要，無廢話。

sentence: We need to identify the {blank} cause of the SMT failure, not just treat the symptoms.
explanation: Root cause (根本原因) 係 QE (品質工程) 最核心嘅詞彙。

sentence: The company plans to {blank} a new quality control policy starting next month.
explanation: Implement a policy/plan 指將政策或計劃付諸實行，商業極常用。

sentence: We need to deeply {blank} the performance of the new testing equipment.
explanation: Evaluate 指對事物嘅價值、表現或狀況進行評估。

sentence: Our engineering team will {blank} with the marketing department on this new product launch.
explanation: Collaborate with 係跨部門合作嘅標準專業用字。

sentence: The management promised to be more {blank} about the upcoming budget cuts.
explanation: Transparent 喺商業上指資訊公開透明、無隱瞞。

sentence: This new automated software is much more {blank} than our old manual system.
explanation: Efficient 形容系統或人做事效率高，唔浪費時間同資源。

sentence: Customer satisfaction is our top {blank} for the next quarter.
explanation: Top priority 意思係最首要、必須優先處理嘅事。

sentence: The assembly plant has already reached its maximum production {blank}.
explanation: Production capacity 係工廠管理術語，指最高產能。

sentence: The QA engineers will {blank} the defect data to find the root cause.
explanation: Analyze data 即係對數據進行分析以得出結論。

sentence: We need to develop a better {blank} to increase our market share in Asia.
explanation: Strategy 係指為達成長期目標而制定嘅策略或計謀。

sentence: The main {blank} of this meeting is to finalize the product design.
explanation: Objective 同 goal 相似，但更常在專業語境中指具體目標。

sentence: We should prepare an {blank} plan in case the shipment is delayed by the storm.
explanation: Alternative plan 即係 Plan B 或替代方案。

sentence: Please ensure that your presentation only includes information {blank} to the audit.
explanation: Relevant to... 指同某個主題有直接關係、切題。

sentence: Could you please {blank} on what you meant by 'system failure'?
explanation: Elaborate on 係請人對某一點進一步詳細解釋嘅專業講法。

sentence: We might need to {blank} the original design to meet the new safety standards.
explanation: Modify 指為咗改善或符合標準而作出少許修改。

sentence: The director has to {blank} the budget before we can purchase the new servers.
explanation: Approve a budget/request 意思係上級正式批准。

sentence: With this new marketing campaign, our sales will likely {blank} our expectations.
explanation: Exceed expectations 係指表現好過預期。

sentence: We must take immediate steps to {blank} the risk of accidents in the warehouse.
explanation: Minimize risk 指將風險或損失減到最低。

sentence: The company is planning to {blank} its business into the European market next year.
explanation: Expand business/market 係指業務擴張。

sentence: It is crucial to {blank} a good professional relationship with our key suppliers.
explanation: Maintain a relationship/standard 指保持喺良好嘅狀態。

sentence: Regular check-ups can help {blank} unexpected breakdowns of the factory machines.
explanation: Prevent 意思係採取措施阻止壞事發生。

sentence: The IT team is trying to {blank} the network connection issue right now.
explanation: Troubleshoot 係工程同 IT 常用字，指尋找並解決技術問題。

sentence: There has been a {blank} improvement in the yield rate since we updated the software.
explanation: Significant improvement 指改善幅度好大、好明顯。

sentence: Attention to detail is absolutely {blank} when conducting a quality audit.

options.trans: 不可或缺的 / 必要的

explanation: Essential 意思同 vital/important 接近，指絕對必需。

sentence: The technician performs a {blank} inspection of the cooling system every Friday.
explanation: Routine inspection 係指按既定時間表進行嘅例行檢查。

sentence: We must carefully {blank} every single component before it is packed for shipping.
explanation: Inspect 指為咗搵錯漏而進行仔細檢查。

sentence: Please ensure you properly {blank} all the steps you took to resolve the error.
explanation: Document 喺度做動詞，指將過程或結果以書面形式記錄低。

sentence: The HR department will {blank} the training schedule for all new resident engineers.
explanation: Coordinate 指協調各方、統籌安排令事情順利進行。

sentence: Using tape is just a {blank} fix; we need a real replacement part.
explanation: Temporary fix 指臨時嘅解決方法。

sentence: If the oil leak is not stopped, it could cause {blank} damage to the engine.
explanation: Permanent damage 意思係造成無得修復嘅長遠破壞。

sentence: Our {blank} plan was to finish by May, but we faced several unexpected delays.
explanation: Initial plan 常用於講述原本一開始嘅計劃。

sentence: The consultant provided a very {blank} report covering every aspect of the supply chain.
explanation: Comprehensive report 指內容包羅萬有、鉅細無遺嘅報告。

sentence: Please make sure there is {blank} lighting in the room before starting the delicate repair.
explanation: Adequate 同 enough 意思相近，但語氣更正式，指達到需求標準。

sentence: The assembly line had to be paused due to a severe {blank} of critical microchips.
explanation: Shortage of materials/components 係製造業常見嘅問題。

sentence: You must present a {blank} employee ID card to enter the restricted server room.
explanation: Valid ID 指無過期、合乎規格嘅證件或證明。

sentence: The warehouse manager returned all the {blank} units back to the original supplier.
explanation: Defective units 就係大家成日講嘅「不良品」或 NG 品。

sentence: It is {blank} procedure to test all software updates on a secure server before release.
explanation: Standard procedure (SOP) 意思係標準作業程序。

sentence: This document contains sensitive {blank} data and should never be emailed to clients.
explanation: Internal data 指只限公司內部傳閱嘅資料。

sentence: We hired an {blank} auditor to independently review our financial and quality records.
explanation: External auditor 指從公司外面聘請返嚟嘅第三方審計員。

sentence: Please reply to this request as soon as possible; the matter is highly {blank}.
explanation: Urgent 形容事情急需處理，Email 常見字。

sentence: The heavy snowstorm caused a significant {blank} in the delivery of our raw materials.
explanation: Cause a delay 指導致時間上嘅延誤。

sentence: Since the old method failed, we need to take a completely different {blank} to solve this issue.
explanation: Take an approach 意思係採取某種方法或角度去處理問題。

sentence: The overall cost is the most important {blank} we must consider when choosing a new supplier.
explanation: Factor 係指影響結果或決定嘅重要元素。

sentence: Let's try to look at this user interface issue from the customer's {blank}.
explanation: From someone's perspective 意思係代入某人嘅角度去睇事物。

sentence: Although the process was difficult, the successful {blank} of the project made everyone proud.
explanation: Outcome 同 result 相似，多數指一件事情最終帶嚟嘅成效或結果。

sentence: The development team values your honest {blank} and will use it to improve the app.
explanation: Feedback 係職場同產品開發極常用字，指收集返嚟嘅意見。

sentence: The most attractive {blank} of this new smartwatch is its extended battery life.
explanation: Feature 指產品主打嘅功能或特色。

sentence: Unfortunately, the new tracking software is not {blank} with our older operating systems.
explanation: Compatible with 係 IT 常見搭配，指系統之間能夠互相配合運作。

sentence: We need to {blank} our servers tonight to handle the increasing volume of web traffic.
explanation: Upgrade 指提升硬體或軟件嘅等級效能。

sentence: The IT technician managed to {blank} all the accidentally deleted files from the backup drive.
explanation: Restore data/files 意思係將資料還原返出嚟。

sentence: A good marketing campaign should {blank} a lot of interest and potential leads for the brand.
explanation: Generate interest/revenue/reports 指產生、製造出某啲結果或事物。

sentence: The manager will {blank} specific tasks to each team member tomorrow.
explanation: Assign tasks 係職場派 Job 嘅標準講法。

sentence: We need to accurately {blank} the total cost before asking for budget approval.
explanation: Calculate 意思係精確地計出數值。

sentence: Can you {blank} how long the SMT repair will take?
explanation: Estimate 指喺未有確實數據前做一個大概嘅估計。

sentence: The purchasing department is trying to {blank} a better price with the supplier.
explanation: Negotiate 係議價或傾合約嘅專業詞。

sentence: The QE team must {blank} the root cause of the sudden defect rate increase.
explanation: Investigate 指深入調查事件原因。

sentence: Please {blank} that all cables are connected properly before turning on the machine.
explanation: Verify 指確認某件事情係正確無誤。

sentence: We need to be {blank} with our schedule because the client might change the meeting time.
explanation: Flexible 形容可以因應情況變通。

sentence: The factory cannot {blank} a 100% yield rate, but they are aiming for 98%.
explanation: Guarantee 指拍心口保證。

sentence: Make sure you enter the serial numbers {blank} into the new OBA system.
explanation: Accurately 指精準無誤地完成動作。

sentence: I tried to {blank} him that updating the firmware is necessary for security.
explanation: Convince 意思係用道理令其他人相信。

sentence: During the training, the expert will {blank} how to properly use the testing tools.
explanation: Demonstrate 意思係做示範俾人睇。

sentence: It takes discipline to {blank} a healthy diet while traveling.
explanation: Maintain 係保持某種好嘅狀態。

sentence: All staff members are encouraged to {blank} in the upcoming safety workshop.
explanation: Participate 係 join 嘅高級版，解作參與。

sentence: It is hard to {blank} exactly when the components will arrive due to the storm.
explanation: Predict 指預計未來嘅事。

sentence: The team worked together to {blank} the difficult manufacturing problem.
explanation: Tackle a problem 係迎難而上解決問題嘅生動講法。

sentence: He agreed to {blank} the responsibility of leading the new integration project.
explanation: Undertake 指接受並承擔一項任務或責任。

sentence: The new material is strong enough to {blank} high pressure and heat.
explanation: Withstand 常用於工程，指可以頂得順極端環境。

sentence: The thermostat is designed to {blank} the engine's temperature automatically.
explanation: Regulate 喺機械上指自動調整，喺管理上指立例規管。

sentence: Since we ran out of part A, we had to use part B as a temporary {blank}.
explanation: Substitute 指代替品。

sentence: Do not {blank} to call me if you have any questions about the 8D report.
explanation: Don't hesitate to... 係 Email 非常客氣嘅結尾句。

sentence: We must {blank} fully to our quality standards, even when facing tight deadlines.
explanation: Commit to something 意思係全心全意投入同遵守。

sentence: During the audit, the inspector will {blank} the operators' behavior on the production line.
explanation: Observe 係稽核(Audit)時常用字，指從旁觀察。

sentence: He doesn't have enough experience to {blank} for the senior engineering position.
explanation: Qualify 意思係合乎資格。

sentence: The serial number on the box does not {blank} with the number on the device.
explanation: Correspond with 喺檢查時指兩樣嘢數據吻合。

sentence: It takes about two hours to completely {blank} the main engine block.
explanation: Assemble 意思係將零件砌埋一齊。
